summary: PR #2074 worked on lb audio/library decompilation, primarily src/melee/lb/lbaudio_ax.c and src/melee/lb/lbbgflash.c, with related prototype/static-header updates. The author described lbbgflash.c and lbaudio_ax.c as matches; the loaded bot report confirms 4 new matches and 10 unmatched-function improvements, while also reporting one .sdata2 regression.

key_files.role: Primary decompilation work: added many function bodies, new includes for gobj/userdata/camera/fighter/item helpers, typed lbAudioAx_UserData accesses, gobj entity iteration, audio voice keyoff handling, sound-parameter setup, bank/flag update logic, and bitmask-based stage/audio table updates.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.c hunks adding fn_80023254, fn_800251EC, fn_80025B44, fn_80025CBC, fn_80025E38, lbAudioAx_800263E8, lbAudioAx_800264E4, lbAudioAx_80026510, fn_800267B0, fn_800268B4, lbAudioAx_80026F2C, lbAudioAx_8002702C
text_corpus: bot report lists lbaudio_ax new matches and improvements

key_files.role: Header prototype recovery for lbAudioAx functions, replacing several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with concrete void, bool, HSD_GObj*, and argument types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h prototype changes for fn_80023254, lbAudioAx_8002392C, lbAudioAx_80024F08, fn_80025FAC, fn_800262A0, lbAudioAx_800264E4, lbAudioAx_80026510, fn_800267B0, fn_800268B4

what_changed: Replaced multiple lbaudio_ax placeholder comments with C implementations, including audio panning/interpolation helpers, gobj creation/userdata setup, entity-linked audio cleanup, bank flag accounting, and 64-bit mask table manipulation.
Recovered or updated function prototypes in lbaudio_ax.h, converting several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations to concrete signatures.
Added includes in lbaudio_ax.c for baselib gobjproc/gobjuserdata, camera, fighter library, and item helper dependencies used by the new function bodies.
Changed lbAudioAx_800265C4 from raw M2C_FIELD/int-array userdata access to typed HSD_GObj_Entities indexing and lbAudioAx_UserData field access.
Added static header files or declarations in lb, vi, and menu areas to support cross-file references; the loaded slice gives file counts but not their exact content.
Bot report recorded 4 new matches: lbAudioAx_8002702C, fn_800267B0, fn_80021C1C in lbbgflash, and lbAudioAx_800264E4.
Bot report recorded 10 improvements in unmatched functions, mostly in lbaudio_ax plus lbbgflash fn_800204C8.
Bot report recorded a .sdata2 unmatched-function regression from 70.59% to 69.44%.

smart_moves.text: The PR updated public prototypes after adding bodies, reducing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS in lbaudio_ax.h rather than leaving stale declarations.
The PR used typed userdata fields in lbAudioAx_800265C4 instead of raw int indexing and replaced M2C_FIELD(HSD_GObj_Entities, ..., 0xF8) with an indexed HSD_GObj_Entities access.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_800265C4 change from int* user_data/user_data[2]/user_data[12] to lbAudioAx_UserData* ud, ud->entity, ud->voice_id

smart_moves.text: The new lbaudio_ax bodies made dependencies explicit through includes for gobjproc, gobjuserdata, camera, ftlib, and item helpers.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a recovered body proves call signatures, update the owning header in the same PR so downstream call sites and require-prototype style checks see concrete types.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h changed fn_80023254 to void fn_80023254(s32 arg0)
raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h changed fn_80025FAC to void fn_80025FAC(HSD_GObj* gobj, void* userdata, void* params)
raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.h changed lbAudioAx_80026510 from void to bool

decomp_lessons.lesson: For gobj/userdata loops, replacing generated raw userdata array indexing with a recovered userdata type can make entity and voice-id logic reviewable while preserving the same traversal structure.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_80026510 iterates HSD_GObj_Entities[0x3E], reads ud->entity and ud->voice_id

decomp_lessons.lesson: A PR body claim of broad file matches should be checked against bot detail: this slice confirms some exact new matches but many added functions remained partial improvements.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists 4 new matches and 10 improvements in unmatched functions

naming_conventions.text: Address-style names were retained for unknown functions and globals such as fn_80023254, fn_800251EC, lbl_80433B44, s32_arr_803BB5D0, and offsets_arr_803BC4E4 when stronger semantics were not shown in the slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbaudio_ax.c new bodies retain fn_/lbl_/address-style names

naming_conventions.text: Local role names were introduced where clear from usage, such as gobj, userdata, entity, voice_id, cam_left, cam_center, cam_right, pan_left, and pan_right.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: fn_800251EC locals and field accesses

naming_conventions.text: A temporary local struct named SoundParams was introduced for packing arguments to fn_80025FAC, but most fields remained offset-style x4/xC/x10/etc. where semantics were not established in the loaded slice.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: typedef struct SoundParams in lbaudio_ax.c

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Preserved some generated-looking gotos and labels in newly added functions, likely to hold close code shape for matching or high-score improvements; examples include ret_true/set_flag/store_pan in fn_800251EC and loop_body/loop_check in fn_800267B0.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: A pre-existing PAD_STACK(16) remains in lbAudioAx_800265C4 while the surrounding access was made more typed; the slice does not include objdiff rationale for the stack padding.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Update owning headers when recovered bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2074 replaced several lbaudio_ax.h UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with concrete signatures alongside new lbaudio_ax.c bodies. This is a graph-safe example of the existing truthful-header practice, not a new standard.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Typed userdata fields can replace raw gobj userdata indexing
accepted_candidate_records.text: In lbAudioAx_800265C4, the PR changed raw int* userdata indexing to lbAudioAx_UserData* and named field accesses for entity and voice_id, while preserving the gobj traversal.

source_update_candidates.title: lbaudio_ax audio gobj list uses HSD_GObj_Entities[0x3E] in this PR slice
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2074 changed lbAudioAx_800265C4 to use ((HSD_GObj**) HSD_GObj_Entities)[0x3E] and added similar traversal in lbAudioAx_80026510. Curator should verify against current source before recording as a path fact.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: lbAudioAx_80026510 and lbAudioAx_800265C4 use HSD_GObj_Entities[0x3E]
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential reusable path fact about audio gobj entity list indexing, but PR evidence alone should not promote it globally.
